content:
- Closeout completed. Ran task_switch.sh, committed the Ralph/task-state updates, and pushed commit 014d099 to origin/master.
- The repo stayed clean after the post-commit docs publish hook; no AGENTS.md learning was warranted because the key surprise was task-text drift specific to this task, already captured in the task file and commit message.
- Quitting immediately as instructed after successful push.

- Read progress log, current active tasks, and done tasks.
- Confirmed the only active failing bug (`rewind-and-basebackup-source-are-static...`) is blocked by backup-removal tasks 01, 02, 04, 05.
- Verified blockers 01, 02, and 04 already pass in `.ralph/current_tasks_done.md`; blocker 05 is still active and failing.
- Determined there are no unblocked failing bugs right now, so selection falls to other unblocked failing tasks.
- The strongest next task is `.ralph/tasks/story-remove-backup-feature/05-task-remove-backup-docs-and-obsolete-task-artifacts.md` because it is high priority, unblocked, and it unlocks the remaining bug plus the authoritative managed Postgres config story.
- Next: write that path into `.ralph/current_task.txt` and stop immediately.

- Wrote `.ralph/current_task.txt` with `.ralph/tasks/story-remove-backup-feature/05-task-remove-backup-docs-and-obsolete-task-artifacts.md`.
- Stopping immediately after task selection as instructed.

- Read prior progress log and current task pointer.
- Current task is .ralph/tasks/story-remove-backup-feature/05-task-remove-backup-docs-and-obsolete-task-artifacts.md.
- Opening the task file now to determine whether this turn is planning, skeptical review, or execution.

- Inspected the active docs/task inventory enough to ground the plan.
- Found important drift: the old pgBackRest story dir, named bug artifacts, and removed operator runbook files are already absent; operator index still advertises the deleted runbooks.
- Wrote a detailed execution plan into 05-task-remove-backup-docs-and-obsolete-task-artifacts.md and ended it with TO BE VERIFIED as required.
- Stopping here without execution so the next turn can perform the skeptical plan review and alter at least one thing before NOW EXECUTE.

- Read current_task and confirmed active task is story-remove-backup-feature/05-task-remove-backup-docs-and-obsolete-task-artifacts.md.
- Previous Codex pass already wrote a plan ending in TO BE VERIFIED, so this turn must do the skeptical review, change the plan materially, and only then mark NOW EXECUTE.
- Reading the task file and plan contents now to validate what needs to change before execution can start.

- Reviewed live repo state against the draft plan.
- Found a substantive plan flaw: the draft treated docs/book as something to update in-tree, but Makefile/docs verification indicate docs/book is generated/ignored output and should be validated via docs-build rather than hand-managed as tracked content.
- Reading the docs build rules now so I can update the task plan with the correct execution and verification steps before switching TO BE VERIFIED to NOW EXECUTE.

- Performed the skeptical review on the backup-docs cleanup task plan.
- Changed the plan materially: corrected it to treat docs/book as generated/ignored output, added explicit make docs-build and make docs-hygiene validation steps, and removed the implication that generated book output should be reviewed as tracked git work.
- Replaced TO BE VERIFIED with NOW EXECUTE and am stopping here so the next turn can execute the plan directly without re-exploration.

- Read previous progress and confirmed the current task pointer is .ralph/tasks/story-remove-backup-feature/05-task-remove-backup-docs-and-obsolete-task-artifacts.md.
- Previous pass already completed planning and skeptical review; the task should now be in NOW EXECUTE state, so I am opening the task file and repo status to execute exactly what was written.
- Next: make only the planned doc/task-file cleanup edits, run the required verification commands, then perform Ralph closeout if everything passes.

- Confirmed the live doc residue was much smaller than the stale task description implied.
- Patched docs/src/operator/index.md to drop the deleted runbook list, docs/src/operator/configuration.md to remove transitional backup-removal wording, and docs/src/interfaces/node-api.md to describe only the live API surface.
- Next: rerun the required search checklist, consume the parallel verification result for contributor/quick-start docs and Ralph inventory, then update task checkboxes and run docs/gate commands.

- Verified only the requested areas without editing files.
- Searched docs/src/contributors/ and docs/src/quick-start/ for stale backup/pgBackRest/restore-takeover/WAL-passthrough references; exact-pattern searches returned clean, with only unrelated HA/basebackup/recovery terminology present.
- Checked .ralph/tasks/ for the obsolete story-pgbackrest-managed-backup-recovery directory and the two named bug files; all are absent.

- Verified docs/src is clean for the planned backup-feature search terms and built the docs successfully with make docs-build plus make docs-hygiene.
- Updated the active task file to in_progress and checked off all doc/inventory acceptance items that now have evidence.
- Next: run make check, make test, make test-long, and make lint in order; only after all four pass will I mark the task done and perform Ralph closeout.

- All required gates passed for the docs/inventory cleanup task: make check, make test, make test-long, and make lint.
- Marked the task file done with passes=true and completed all acceptance checkboxes.
- Next: run .ralph/task_switch.sh, review final git status, commit every changed file including .ralph state, push, and then stop immediately.
